summary: Phase 4 testing completed successfully. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all 3 new pages (Seller Dashboard, Loyalty, Referral) load correctly with proper data display and functionality.
passed_tests: GET /api/seller/dashboard - contains summary with all required fields (total_ads, active_ads, total_views, etc.)
GET /api/seller/dashboard - contains loyalty info with points and level
GET /api/loyalty/status - contains all required fields (points, level, next_level, points_to_next, recent_transactions, all_levels)
GET /api/loyalty/status - all_levels contains Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum
POST /api/loyalty/claim-daily - endpoint works (returns 200 or 400 if already claimed)
GET /api/referral/code - contains all required fields (referral_code, referral_link, total_referrals, points_earned)
GET /api/referral/code - referral code starts with X67
frontend_verified: User dropdown menu contains 'Statistici Vânzător' (Seller Dashboard) menu item
User dropdown menu contains 'Puncte Loialitate' (Loyalty) menu item
User dropdown menu contains 'Program Referral' (Referral) menu item
Seller Dashboard page (/seller-dashboard) loads with data-testid='seller-dashboard'
Seller Dashboard shows title 'Dashboard Vânzător' and welcome message
Seller Dashboard displays stats cards: Anunțuri Active, Vizualizări, Favorite, Conversații
Seller Dashboard shows Oferte de Preț section with pending/accepted counts
Seller Dashboard shows Rating section with stars
Seller Dashboard shows Nivel Fidelitate card with level and points
Seller Dashboard shows Top Anunțuri section
Loyalty page (/loyalty) loads with data-testid='loyalty-page'
Loyalty page shows current level (Bronze) with points count
Loyalty page shows progress bar to next level (Silver)
Loyalty page shows 'Beneficiile tale' section with current benefits
Loyalty page shows 'Bonus Zilnic' section with 'Revendică' button
Loyalty page shows all 4 levels: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum
Loyalty page daily claim button works (shows error toast when already claimed)
Referral page (/referral) loads with data-testid='referral-page'
Referral page shows title 'Program Referral'
Referral page shows referral code (X67IN_001)
Referral page shows referral link with Share button
Referral page shows stats: Utilizatori invitați, Puncte câștigate
Referral page shows 'Beneficiile tale' section
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing admin account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working: 1) Seller Dashboard page displays all seller statistics including ads count, views, favorites, conversations, offers, rating, and loyalty level. 2) Loyalty page shows current level (Bronze), points (2), progress to next level, daily bonus claim functionality, and all 4 loyalty levels. 3) Referral page shows unique referral code (X67IN_001), shareable link, referral stats, and benefits. All 3 new menu items appear in user dropdown: Statistici Vânzător, Puncte Loialitate, Program Referral. Daily bonus claim correctly prevents double-claiming with error message.
